description_long: This object represents an adult male pedestrian with a distorted and fragmented body structure. The figure is dressed in a collared shirt and long pants, with visible shoes and a distinct head featuring short hair. The torso and limbs are unnaturally stretched and fragmented, with sharp, angular extensions protruding from the body, giving a surreal and broken appearance. The head is slightly separated from the neck, and the arms and torso are elongated in an unnatural manner. The overall form is humanoid but heavily deformed, with jagged, planar surfaces extending outward from the body. The clothing and body parts are visually distinct, but the severe geometric distortions dominate the object's appearance.
description: A heavily distorted adult male pedestrian figure with fragmented limbs and sharp, angular extensions, dressed in a collared shirt and pants.
description_view_0: Front view shows the fragmented torso, separated head, and sharp extensions radiating from the body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated arm and torso, with angular protrusions extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the shirt and pants, with the most pronounced jagged extensions visible.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the bent legs, extended arm, and the sharp, planar distortions on the side.
attribute_clothing_type: collared button-up shirt and straight-leg pants
attribute_posture: unnaturally twisted and fragmented standing pose
